name: UCI Concrete Compressive Strength (Yeh 1998)
license_or_terms: Public; UCI ML Repository (CC BY 4.0); cite Yeh 1998
columns_summary: 8 inputs: cement, blast furnace slag, fly ash, water, superplasticizer, coarse aggregate, fine aggregate, age (kg/m3 except age in days)
use_in_chapter: Train/evaluate the compressive-strength model; source of mix & test data block; basis for passport demonstration

name: Compiled Dataset of Concrete Mixture EPDs in the U.S.A. (Broyles Gevaudan & Brown 2024)
license_or_terms: Mendeley Data (public; CC BY 4.0 typical); cite Data in Brief 52:109852 (2024)
download_method: Public download URL via Mendeley public-api (verified 200; v3 CSV ~81 MB)
columns_summary: >200 fields incl. Company/Plant, U.S. Region, EPD Program Operator, EPD dates, Mixture Label/Description, Concrete Compressive Strength (psi), Concrete Curation Time, Declared Unit, Product Components, A1-A3 GWP (kg CO2-eq) and stage-split A1/A2/A3 plus ODP/AP/EP/POCP and waste/water indicators (header verified)
target_variables: A1-A3 Global Warming Potential (kg CO2-eq); also strength class (psi)
missing_data_issues: Many optional LCA fields sparsely populated; declared units and PCRs vary; some missing GWP/strength rows -> filter on download
use_in_chapter: Derive carbon-class thresholds and EPD-based benchmark percentile by strength class/region for the sustainability block

name: SCM-RAC multi-output concrete dataset & framework (Prayogo et al.)
license_or_terms: GitHub repository (code/resources; check repo licence before redistribution)
target_variables: CS, tensile strength, flexural strength, elastic modulus, slump, drying shrinkage, chloride permeability
missing_data_issues: Sparse reporting of some targets (motivates selective info transfer)
use_in_chapter: Reference for optional durability/multi-property extension and durability-data scarcity discussion

name: ICE database - Inventory of Carbon and Energy (Hammond & Jones)
license_or_terms: Open database (University of Bath / Circular Ecology; attribution required)
download_method: Manual (published tables) staged into data/external with citation
num_samples: ~200 materials incl. cement, GGBS, fly ash, aggregate, water, admixture
columns_summary: Embodied carbon factors (kg CO2e per kg) per constituent
target_variables: Generic cradle-to-gate factors; not mix/plant specific; version differences
inclusion_status: Transparent per-constituent carbon factors for a documented linear GWP estimate from mix composition

name: NRMCA Industry-Average EPD / regional GWP benchmarks (and GSA/FHWA limits)
license_or_terms: Public industry reports / U.S. government limits (cite source)
download_method: Manual (published benchmark values) staged into data/external
num_samples: regional benchmarks by strength class (e.g., 2500-8000 psi)
columns_summary: Industry-average GWP benchmark per strength class/region
target_variables: Region/year specific; not a per-mix dataset
inclusion_status: Define Low/Typical/High carbon-class anchors and cross-check EPD percentiles

name: buildingSMART Sample-Test-Files (IFC)
columns_summary: IFC entities incl. materials and elements
inclusion_status: Optional concrete sample to illustrate IFC mapping targets; not required for the workflow

name: RILEM TC 281-CCC carbonation (SCM) compiled dataset
license_or_terms: Reported within RILEM TC report (access varies)
download_method: Documented only (not openly downloadable as a single file)
num_samples: large compiled carbonation dataset (up to 94% SCM binders)
target_variables: Heterogeneous; not a single public CSV
inclusion_status: Cited as evidence of durability-data scarcity/heterogeneity; not loaded at runtime
